'''Pernam Minor''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Pernam Minor system/Legends|Pernam Minor system]].

==History==
[[Kassar Kosciusko]] saved [[Meysen Kayson]]'s life on Pernam Minor.<ref name="TGWH">{{JournalCite|6|The Greel Wood Haven}}</ref>
